pages.text: These unholy priests leads a congregation of those who worshipped the Great Flame. They're knowledge over the dark realm grants them hellish abilities.

Upon death, they drop their antlered bone helmet that provides some benefits upon the wearer, so long as it's not broken. One of which includes causing newly converted Heretics and Mavericks to serve you. Another is causing Witches, Warlocks, Reprobates, and other Cultists to be neutral to the wearer. It can also be repaired using Bones. Due to its size, it cannot be worn as a Curio.
